backend/main.mo: Empty Motoko actor serving as the backend canister placeholder with no implemented methods.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping implemented features (entry screen, parchment scroll UI, letter content, Google Fonts) to their source files, components, test IDs, and confidence levels.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document summarizing the purpose and key details of each frontend source file for build planning reference.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind base CSS file defining Shadcn CSS custom property tokens for light and dark themes with no custom application styles.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point with the app title, Google Fonts imports for Dancing Script, Cinzel, and Great Vibes, and the React root div.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root component managing showScroll/isClosing state to toggle between the entry screen with EntryButton and the ScrollLetter component, plus a fixed footer attribution link.
frontend/src/components/EntryButton.tsx: Simple button component rendering the 'Open My Heart ❤️' button styled via the 'enter-btn' CSS class.
frontend/src/components/Envelope.tsx: Empty file with no implemented content.
frontend/src/components/FloatingHearts.t: Empty file with no implemented content.
frontend/src/components/FlowerGrid.tsx: Empty file with no implemented content.
frontend/src/components/GardenPage.tsx: Empty file with no implemented content.
Empty file with no implemented content.
frontend/src/components/HeartBurst.tsx: Empty file with no implemented content.
frontend/src/components/HeartCanvas.tsx: Empty file with no implemented content.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: Empty file with no implemented content.
Empty file with no implemented content.
frontend/src/components/LetterContent.ts: Renders the letter body inside the parchment scroll, including a Great Vibes h1 title, six Dancing Script paragraphs, a gold divider, an exam note highlight section, and a 'Roll Back & Close' button that triggers the close callback.
frontend/src/components/LoveLetterPage.t: Empty file with no implemented content.
frontend/src/components/MessageDisplay.t: Empty file with no implemented content.
frontend/src/components/MusicControl.tsx: Empty file with no implemented content.
frontend/src/components/ReplayButton.tsx: Empty file with no implemented content.
frontend/src/components/ScrollLetter.tsx: Animated parchment scroll component with top/bottom wooden roll handles and a parchment body that transitions to 'open' state after a 100ms delay, revealing LetterContent with a fade-in wrapper.
frontend/src/components/SealButton.tsx: Empty file with no implemented content.
frontend/src/components/StarBackground.t: Empty file with no implemented content.
frontend/src/components/SurpriseButton.t: Empty file with no implemented content.
frontend/src/components/ThankYouModal.ts: Empty file with no implemented content.
frontend/src/components/WelcomeGate.tsx: Empty file with no implemented content.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor via React Query, using the current Internet Identity or falling back to an anonymous actor, and invalidates dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useBackgroundMusic.ts: Empty file with no implemented content.
frontend/src/hooks/useHeartAnimation.ts: Empty file with no implemented content.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an InternetIdentityProvider and useInternetIdentity hook for managing DFINITY AuthClient login/logout state, identity persistence, and idle handling configuration.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Placeholder module reserved for future React Query backend hooks; currently exports nothing.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet that imports Tailwind, defines CSS custom properties for a dark parchment-themed UI (colors, fonts, radii), and styles core layout elements like the entry screen, scroll container, wooden roll handles, and enter button.
frontend/src/main.tsx: React app entry point that mounts the root component wrapped in QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration extending the default theme with custom parchment/ink/gold colors mapped to CSS variables, custom font families (Cinzel, Dancing Script, Great Vibes), and accordion keyframe animations.
project_state.json: Project state manifest (version 3) describing the romantic parchment-scroll letter app's architecture, existing features, and design requirements including entry screen, scroll animation, letter content, and Google Fonts usage.
